since_last: 61% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.63%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.87% · Gold +0.25% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 61% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.63%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.63%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +5.79%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +5.79%, DLR +3.95%, UPST +3.30%, NOW +2.51%, PUBM +2.44%. Laggards: SKHY -2.99%, MU -1.86%, BABA -1.75%, CGNX -1.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.92% at $117.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.92% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
